description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Open the 2023 annual report for any listed company in the Industrials sector using the filings and reports filters.
tasks.name: Open the 2023 annual report for any listed company in the Industrials sector using the filings and reports filters.
tasks.description: Open the 2023 annual report for any listed company in the Industrials sector using the filings and reports filters.

tasks.instruction: Using the company screener, find banking-sector stocks with market capitalization between $1B and $10B and dividend yield of at least 2%, then add the three highest-yielding results to the comparison tool.
tasks.name: Using the company screener, find banking-sector stocks with market capitalization between $1B and $10B and dividend yield of at least 2%, then add the three highest-yielding results to the comparison tool.
tasks.description: Using the company screener, find banking-sector stocks with market capitalization between $1B and $10B and dividend yield of at least 2%, then add the three highest-yielding results to the comparison tool.

tasks.instruction: In the corporate events calendar, filter for annual general meetings of non-financial companies scheduled in the second quarter of 2025 and add the earliest such AGM to your calendar.
tasks.name: In the corporate events calendar, filter for annual general meetings of non-financial companies scheduled in the second quarter of 2025 and add the earliest such AGM to your calendar.
tasks.description: In the corporate events calendar, filter for annual general meetings of non-financial companies scheduled in the second quarter of 2025 and add the earliest such AGM to your calendar.

tasks.instruction: In the regulatory announcements search, select an Energy sector issuer, filter for board change announcements during 2024, and add the most recently published one to your watchlist.

target_names: Lumina Energy Corp - Board Chair Succession

tasks.instruction: From the IPO archive, filter offerings from 2023 with offer prices between $10 and $25, sort by offer size, and open the prospectus for the largest offering in that range.

target_names: Bluewave Payments Holdings Inc - IPO Prospectus

tasks.instruction: Using ESG company ratings, filter for Energy sector companies with ESG scores of at least 70, sort by ESG score, and open the most recent sustainability report for the top-rated company.
tasks.name: Using ESG company ratings, filter for Energy sector companies with ESG scores of at least 70, sort by ESG score, and open the most recent sustainability report for the top-rated company.

tasks.instruction: On the investor relations contact page, choose the corporate disclosures topic, complete all required fields with a question about the timing of a recent dividend announcement, and submit the form.

expected_values.subject: Question about dividend announcement delay
expected_values.message: I would like more information about the timing of the latest dividend announcement and its payment date.

tasks.instruction: On the most-active stocks by volume page, filter for the Technology sector on a specified trading day and open the price history for the stock ranked third by trading volume.
tasks.name: On the most-active stocks by volume page, filter for the Technology sector on a specified trading day and open the price history for the stock ranked third by trading volume.

tasks.instruction: Using the board composition search, find companies with at least three independent directors and a female board chair, sort them by market capitalization, compare the top two, and in the comparison view open the board charter for the larger company.
